overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man showing the character walking through a snowy New York City at night. The clip transitions from street crossings to waterfront promenades and pier areas, showcasing detailed urban architecture with modern glass towers and historic brick buildings under streetlight illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk near waterfront

events.description: pedestrian in plaid shirt and cap walks past from left to right

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking across a snowy crosswalk toward the waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: man in plaid shirt and cap walking across crosswalk from left to right

glass and metal bus shelter with bench inside
black metal railing along the water's edge
distant illuminated skyscrapers visible across the water
illuminated traffic signal showing red

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses a snowy street at a crosswalk, passing a pedestrian in a plaid shirt. A bus shelter and parked cars line the street while the waterfront railing and distant city skyline are visible ahead.

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking along the waterfront promenade with water to the left side

entered.detail: wide concrete walkway with patches of snow
dark smoke rising from industrial structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront promenade, the camera follows Spider-Man past metal railings with the water and a distant smoke plume on the left, while the illuminated city skyline stretches across the right horizon.

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on tall skyscrapers against night sky
camera tilts back down to street level view

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man pauses as the camera tilts up to admire the architecture, then continues walking

entered.detail: modern skyscraper with illuminated windows and reflective glass facade
tall red brick building with multiple lit windows

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to showcase towering skyscrapers against the night sky, highlighting a modern glass tower and historic brick apartment buildings, before tilting back down to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with storefronts and street parking

events.description: two pedestrians walking opposite direction pass by on the left side of sidewalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and street furniture

second pedestrian in dark clothing walking behind the first man

tall street lamp casting warm yellow light
USPS blue postal collection box
tall concrete wall with stone cap running along sidewalk

row of parked vehicles along the street curb

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a city sidewalk lined with parked cars, street lamps, and a concrete retaining wall. The camera passes a blue mailbox and 'Deli Monte' storefront while encountering pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: recreational pier with tennis courts and waterfront seating

events.description: passing through the NY Pier entrance gate into the pier area

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking through the NY Pier entrance gate and continuing along the waterfront path

notable_agents.action: woman in black suit walking ahead on the pier pathway
two people sitting on wooden bench facing the water

entered.detail: teal metal archway with 'NY PIER' signage at entrance
metal fencing surrounding tennis courts on left side

metal railing along the pier edge with water beyond
wooden park benches facing the water
large planters with conical evergreen trees

segments.scene_description: Entering the NY Pier through a teal metal archway, Spider-Man walks past chain-link fences enclosing tennis courts. The pier features wooden benches where people sit overlooking the water, with metal railings now on the right side as the path continues along the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy New York City night, transitioning from a busy street crossing to the open expanse of a waterfront pier. It begins with Spider-Man crossing a snowy street past a bus shelter and parked cars, moving toward a waterfront railing with the city skyline visible ahead. As he reaches the promenade, the camera glides past metal railings and a distant smoke plume before tilting upward to showcase the contrast between modern glass towers and historic brick apartments against the dark sky. The view then returns to street level, following him past a blue mailbox and the Deli Monte storefront along a sidewalk lined with street lamps and pedestrians. Finally, the scene shifts as he enters the NY Pier through a teal metal archway, passing chain-link tennis courts and wooden benches where people overlook the water.
